creator: scheffler@beuth-hochschule.de
text:
(In reply to Andrey V. Elsukov from comment #4)


Correct. Repeated transmission is only expected for 'state change reports'.
Otherwise section 9.4 applies and takes care of lost reports: http://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc3810#section-9.4 

I will attach the Linux trace in a minute...
